definition: Functional overlap or backup capacity for critical functions
measurement_note: Count pathways that can actually preserve function under stress

definition: Meaningful variation in technology institutions knowledge species geography or strategy
measurement_note: Assess whether variation improves response options rather than only superficial difference

definition: Variation in response among components that support similar functions
measurement_note: Measure whether backup pathways fail differently under disturbance

definition: Ability of diverse and redundant components to work together
measurement_note: Review interoperability governance protocols communication and role clarity

definition: Extent to which redundancy and diversity reduce unequal exposure and protect vulnerable groups
measurement_note: Use distributional indicators community access repair priority and participatory validation

definition: Probability that backup systems remain tested funded staffed and operational
measurement_note: Review testing schedules funding staffing documentation and drill records

definition: Exposure of multiple pathways to the same failure source
measurement_note: Map shared suppliers platforms regions fuels authorities assumptions and infrastructure dependencies
